title: The Misanthrope and the Fateful Classroom
overview: Rei Hitoma accepts a teaching job, only to learn that his students are demi-humans aiming to become human.

title: The Misanthrope and the Fleeting Crown of Bubbles
overview: Rei learns why Kyoka wants to become a dancer. A mysterious yet familiar girl appears in the classroom.

title: The Misanthrope and the Lonely Castle Under the Full Moon
overview: Isaki stops attending class and refuses to leave her room, until Rei encounters her by chance one night.

title: The Misanthrope and the Angel's Comet
overview: Sui learns some unexpected news about Seiko Kizaki, the human she's indebted to, and turns to Rei for help.

title: The Misanthrope and Tobari's Hymn
overview: Rei ruins his colleague's handkerchief by accident, only to discover that Tobari witnessed the whole thing.

title: The Misanthrope and the Light of Dawn
overview: The advanced class gets their final assignments needed to graduate, but one student finds herself struggling.

title: The Misanthrope and the Fruitless Love Fortune
overview: It's a new school year, and the advanced class has three new students, including a dragon in love with Rei.

title: The Misanthrope and the Magic for Peace and Quiet
overview: Rei meets Neneko's guardian, a powerful witch, and learns the true reason Neneko seeks to be human.

title: The Misanthrope and the Heart's Deepest Desire
overview: Graduation assignment season is here again, and the advanced class tackles the unique tasks set upon them.

title: The Misanthrope and the Comet's Pilgrimage
overview: The advanced class decides to throw a surprise graduation ceremony. Sui asks Rei to deliver a letter.

title: The Misanthrope and the Nigh Past
overview: The new assistant homeroom teacher for the advanced class turns out to be a familiar face from Rei's past.

title: The Misanthrope and Falsehood Found Nigh
overview: The advanced class goes on a field trip to the nearby convenience store to learn about human society.

title: The Misanthrope and the Nigh Future
overview: Final assignments are here yet again, but it's not only the advanced class that are having trouble with them.
